doctors.name: Dr. M.A. Majid Adil
doctors.bio: Dr. Majid Adil is a highly skilled and experienced urologist affiliated with Unicus Diagnostics. With a passion for providing exceptional patient care, Dr. Adil has gained a reputation for his expertise in diagnosing and treating various urological conditions.

doctors.name: Dr. Shahana Sarwar
doctors.bio: Dr. Shahana Sarwar is a highly accomplished individual serving as the Managing Director of Unicus Diagnostics. With her exceptional leadership skills and extensive expertise in the field of diagnostics, she has propelled Unicus Diagnostics to new heights of success and recognition.

tests.name: Creatinine Test
tests.description: Measures creatinine levels to assess kidney function.

tests.name: CBC Test
tests.description: Complete Blood Count — evaluates overall health and detects disorders.

tests.name: C Reactive Protein Test
tests.description: Measures CRP levels to detect inflammation or infection.

tests.name: Blood Sugar
tests.description: Measures glucose levels in the blood for diabetes screening.
